description: Happy path: Instagram Reel caption for a sponsored thrift haul with full inputs

input.topic: Antique Market Thrift Haul: 5 Moody Vintage Finds Under $20
input.hook_angle: the thrill of finding hidden gems for almost nothing

expect.caption: non-empty string containing hook_line and cta

prohibit: ftc_disclosure_line is null when sponsored is true
em dashes anywhere in the caption
caption does not contain the hook_line text
caption does not contain the cta text
corporate or generic tone inconsistent with warm published-to-audience voice

description: Minimal input: TikTok caption with only required fields, no sponsorship flags

input.topic: Painting a thrifted nightstand in matte black chalk paint

prohibit: ftc_disclosure_line is non-null when no sponsorship flags are set
em dashes anywhere in the caption

description: Edge case: YouTube Shorts caption must respect the tight 100-character limit; gifted and affiliate both true

input.topic: Quick vintage vase arrangement for a moody entryway

expect.caption: non-empty string
expect.notes: string mentioning affiliate flag or truncation if applicable

prohibit: ftc_disclosure_line is #affiliate when gifted is also true (gifted outranks affiliate)
ftc_disclosure_line is null when gifted is true
em dashes anywhere in the caption
notes omits mention of the affiliate flag when both gifted and affiliate are true
